mapper.insert: insert into product (name, pic, status,detail, price, category, number, create_time, update_time,categoryId) VALUES (#{name}, #{pic}, #{status},#{detail}, #{price}, #{category}, #{number}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime},#{categoryId})
mapper.delete:
delete from product where id in
#{id}
mapper.select:
select * from product
and name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and category like concat('%',#{category},'%')
and status = #{status}
order by update_time desc
